summary_text: **Top Risks** - **High: Repetitive conclusions get reinforced, not reduced.** Wiring extraction directly into `xauto-draft-only` still leaves generation as a black-box pass-through with no built-in diversity constraints (no source cap, no semantic de-dup, no conclusion-family penalty). More extracted authors can still collapse into the same thesis template. Ref: [xauto-draft-only.sh#L81](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L81) - **High: Quote/source leakage into body is likely without a hard separation layer.** Contract requires quote URLs in `Source URLs`, not in main body for quote-post flow. Direct extraction inside draft generation increases accidental URL/body mixing. Refs: [x-auto-contract.md#L33](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L33), [x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L52](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L52) - **High: Branded proper nouns will leak unless enforced pre-write.** Current policy explicitly prohibits person/company/product/handle leakage in publish-facing copy unless approved; direct extraction tends to inject exactly those tokens. Refs: [x-auto-contract.md#L53](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L53), [x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L120](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L120) - **Medium: Tight coupling to live APIs will make draft flow brittle.** `xauto-draft-only` already has external runtime dependency (`~/Dev/x-auto` generator) and can write to Notion in execute mode; adding live extraction APIs in the same step increases outage surface and side-effect risk. Refs: [xauto-draft-only.sh#L10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L10), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L90](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L90) - **Medium: Responsibility boundary drift.** `x-auto-draft-only` is defined as draft-only adapter; embedding extraction + policy transforms + network enrichment inside it risks turning it into a monolith and bypassing guard skill responsibilities. Ref: [local-systems.json#L34](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json#L34) **Necessary Guardrails** - Enforce **strict two-channel output**: extracted quote evidence goes only to metadata (`Source URLs`, provenance fields), never directly to body text. - Add a **hard proper-noun gate** before `--write-notion`: fail draft write when leaked handles/brands/names exist without explicit approval. - Add **diversity gates at candidate selection**: per-batch source concentration cap, thesis-family dedup (semantic similarity), and pillar/pattern quotas. - Keep extraction **async and advisory**: if API extraction fails, draft flow should degrade gracefully (no publish path impact), with retry queue. - Preserve SoT contract: Notion remains editable source; any supplemental registry (Supabase/etc.) is advisory-only metadata. - Add behavior tests (not grep-only) validating: `quote URL not in body`, `proper noun blocked`, `source concentration capped`, `no scheduling/status mutation from draft adapter`.
